arts.ttl: Newcastle's Gordon to miss cup final vs. Liverpool
arts.sum: Newcastle United winger Anthony Gordon is set to miss the Carabao Cup final against Liverpool later this month after a receiving a straight-red card in the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Danny Welbeck settles FA Cup classic after red card drama as Newcastle suffer damaging day
arts.sum: Newcastle 1-2 Brighton (a.e.t): The striker’s extra-time winner came after red card drama at St James’ Park with Anthony Gordon now set to miss the Carabao Cup final

arts.ttl: Newcastle 1-2 Brighton: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Danny Welbeck heroics sends Brighton through
arts.sum: Danny Welbeck delivers a moment of magic, scoring the winning goal in extra time as Brighton & Hove Albion defeat Newcastle United in the FA Cup fifth round.

arts.ttl: Welbeck ET goal helps Brighton to FA Cup quarters
arts.sum: Danny Welbeck scored deep into extra time to send Brighton into the FA Cup quarterfinals with a dramatic 2-1 victory over Newcastle United on Sunday after both teams were reduced to 10 men.

arts.ttl: What games Anthony Gordon will miss for Newcastle United after FA Cup red card
arts.sum: Newcastle United star Anthony Gordon is set to miss their next three matches following his straight red card in the FA Cup fifth round tie against Brighton on Sunday afternoon. Things descended into chaos late on in the second half and Gordon was ultimately given his marching orders for a clear push on Brighton's Jan Paul van Hecke.

arts.ttl: Is Anthony Gordon out of the Carabao Cup final? Newcastle red card explained
arts.sum: Newcastle United winger Anthony Gordon is set to miss the Carabao Cup final against Liverpool after receiving a straight red card in the FA Cup quarter-final vs Brighton and Hove Albion. Gordon will be available to play for Newcastle again on April 7 when United travel to struggling Leicester City in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United player ratings as Anthony Gordon suffers red card horror and Magpies crash out
arts.sum: But Minteh levelled the game up just before half-time after finding himself free before calmly stroking it past Martin Dubravka after Joao Pedro's pass. Brighton sub Danny Welbeck netted in stoppage time to steal the game for the travelling side.

arts.ttl: 'Pure class, stunner' - Brighton player ratings vs Newcastle: Two 9s and two 8s as Albion seal FA Cup thriller
arts.sum: Newcastle United vs Brighton and Hove Albion FA Cup fifth round player ratings

arts.ttl: Welbeck strikes in extra-time as Brighton beat Newcastle in FA Cup thriller
arts.sum: Danny Welbeck was the hero for Brighton, scoring deep in extra-time as Fabian Hurzeler's side beat Newcastle 2-1 in an FA Cup thriller to reach the quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Can Newcastle United appeal Anthony Gordon's red card vs Brighton?
arts.sum: Newcastle United do have the chance to appeal Anthony Gordon's red card he received during the FA Cup fifth round tie with Brighton and Hove Albion. Referee Anthony Taylor was in no doubt that it was a straight red card offence for serious foul play.
